## Impact & Scope

### Who is affected?

- [ ] New contributors
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Mobile app developers
- [ ] Web app developers
- [ ] Architects
- [ ] Users
- [ ] Other: _______________

### What's the impact?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — Misleading information causes bugs
- [ ] 🟠 High — Confuses many contributors
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Unclear to some users
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Nice to have improvement

## Proposed Format

<!-- If suggesting a new documentation page, describe structure -->

```markdown
# Title

## Section 1
- Point 1
- Point 2

## Section 2
- Content
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked if this documentation exists elsewhere
- [ ] I've read the current documentation carefully
- [ ] I've identified the specific issue clearly
- [ ] I've provided a constructive suggestion
- [ ] I've considered the impact on different users
